examples: Use underarm deodorant, and go easy with cologne.
As recently as 1965 only half of British women wore an underarm deodorant.
Women may be better at sniffing out biologically relevant information from underarm sweat, a US study suggests.
Sanga prods a quick single, and Captain Colly's underarm throw just misses the stumps by inches.
This one sprang his gun from its underarm clip with an economy that would have impressed Wild Bill.
